steps.title: Read the passage for what the blank must mean
steps.content: The passage says diadromous fish can be ______ euryhaline fish because they are fundamentally different: diadromous fish actually migrate to a different biome; euryhaline fish merely tolerate salinity without relocating. The blank must mean "set apart from" or "distinguished from."

steps.title: Test each choice against that meaning
steps.content:
• Choice A — 'demarcated from': "demarcated from" means clearly separated or set apart by a boundary — exactly what the contrast in the passage requires. ✓
  • Choice B — 'reconstituted as': "reconstituted as" means reformed or reshaped into something new; the passage never says diadromous fish transform into anything. ✗
  • Choice C — 'conflated with': "conflated with" means merged or treated as the same; the passage is drawing a distinction, not merging the two groups. ✗
  • Choice D — 'derived from': "derived from" means originating from; the passage says nothing about one group coming from the other. ✗
That matches choice A — A is correct.
